name: freeperrylarp1
description: Build evidence-bounded Auralo campaigns with one isolated, replaceable FREE product and a mandatory product-marriage contract.

interface.shortDescription: Pair fixed Auralo with an isolated FREE product.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Auralo Pheromone Perfume as the fixed paid product while starting every supplied FREE product from a clean campaign contract. It requires current evidence, an accepted buyer moment and product-marriage brief, bounded angle selection, customer-facing visible text, claim lineage, and cross-campaign leakage checks before prompt delivery.
defaultPrompt: Build a fresh Auralo plus FREE-product campaign.
Audit this campaign for stale-product leakage.
Validate the marriage brief before writing.
